queries.question: List each patients name and their 5 year survival rate.
queries.sql:
SELECT ILLNESSES.fiveYearSurvivalRate, PATIENTS.fullname
FROM PATIENTS 
JOIN DIAGNOSES ON PATIENTS.id = DIAGNOSES.patientId 
JOIN ILLNESSES ON  DIAGNOSES.illnessId = ILLNESSES.illnessID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fiveyearsurvivalrate ?fullname WHERE {
  ?patients a :Patients .
  ?diagnoses a :Diagnoses .
  ?diagnoses p:hasPatients ?patients .
  ?illnesses a :Illnesses .
  ?diagnoses p:hasIllnesses ?illnesses .
  ?illnesses p:fiveYearSurvivalRate ?fiveyearsurvivalrate .
  ?patients p:name ?fullname .
}

queries.question: What is the 10 year survival rate and the outcomes and names of patients?
queries.sql:
SELECT ILLNESSES.tenYearSurvivalRate, APPOINTMENTS.Outcome, PATIENTS.fullname
FROM APPOINTMENTS
JOIN PATIENTS ON APPOINTMENTS.patientId = PATIENTS.id
JOIN DIAGNOSES ON PATIENTS.id = DIAGNOSES.patientId 
JOIN ILLNESSES ON  DIAGNOSES.illnessId = ILLNESSES.illnessID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?tenyearsurvivalrate ?outcome ?fullname WHERE {
  ?appointments a :Appointments .
  ?patients a :Patients .
  ?appointments p:hasPatients ?patients .
  ?diagnoses a :Diagnoses .
  ?diagnoses p:hasPatients ?patients .
  ?illnesses a :Illnesses .
  ?diagnoses p:hasIllnesses ?illnesses .
  ?illnesses p:tenYearSurvivalRate ?tenyearsurvivalrate .
  ?appointments p:outcome ?outcome .
  ?patients p:name ?fullname .
}

queries.question: What are the survival statistics and outcomes of these patients and what are their names?
queries.sql:
SELECT ILLNESSES.fiveYearSurvivalRate, tenYearSurvivalRate, APPOINTMENTS.Outcome, PATIENTS.fullname
FROM APPOINTMENTS
JOIN PATIENTS ON APPOINTMENTS.patientId = PATIENTS.id
JOIN DIAGNOSES ON PATIENTS.id = DIAGNOSES.patientId 
JOIN ILLNESSES ON  DIAGNOSES.illnessId = ILLNESSES.illnessID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fiveyearsurvivalrate ?tenyearsurvivalrate ?outcome ?fullname WHERE {
  ?appointments a :Appointments .
  ?patients a :Patients .
  ?appointments p:hasPatients ?patients .
  ?diagnoses a :Diagnoses .
  ?diagnoses p:hasPatients ?patients .
  ?illnesses a :Illnesses .
  ?diagnoses p:hasIllnesses ?illnesses .
  ?illnesses p:fiveYearSurvivalRate ?fiveyearsurvivalrate .
  ?illnesses p:tenYearSurvivalRate ?tenyearsurvivalrate .
  ?appointments p:outcome ?outcome .
  ?patients p:name ?fullname .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What are the survival statistics of each of these patients and what are their names?
What are the survival statistics and outcomes of these patients and what are their names?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?tenyearsurvivalrate ?outcome ?fullname WHERE {
  ?appointments a :Appointments .
  ?patients a :Patients .
  ?appointments p:hasPatients ?patients .
  ?diagnoses a :Diagnoses .
  ?diagnoses p:hasPatients ?patients .
  ?illnesses a :Illnesses .
  ?diagnoses p:hasIllnesses ?illnesses .
  ?illnesses p:tenYearSurvivalRate ?tenyearsurvivalrate .
  ?appointments p:outcome ?outcome .
  ?patients p:name ?fullname .
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?fiveyearsurvivalrate ?outcome ?fullname WHERE {
  ?appointments a :Appointments .
  ?patients a :Patients .
  ?appointments p:hasPatients ?patients .
  ?diagnoses a :Diagnoses .
  ?diagnoses p:hasPatients ?patients .
  ?illnesses a :Illnesses .
  ?diagnoses p:hasIllnesses ?illnesses .
  ?illnesses p:fiveYearSurvivalRate ?fiveyearsurvivalrate .
  ?appointments p:outcome ?outcome .
  ?patients p:name ?fullname .
} }
  full: { SELECT ?fiveyearsurvivalrate ?tenyearsurvivalrate ?outcome ?fullname WHERE {
  ?appointments a :Appointments .
  ?patients a :Patients .
  ?appointments p:hasPatients ?patients .
  ?diagnoses a :Diagnoses .
  ?diagnoses p:hasPatients ?patients .
  ?illnesses a :Illnesses .
  ?diagnoses p:hasIllnesses ?illnesses .
  ?illnesses p:fiveYearSurvivalRate ?fiveyearsurvivalrate .
  ?illnesses p:tenYearSurvivalRate ?tenyearsurvivalrate .
  ?appointments p:outcome ?outcome .
  ?patients p:name ?fullname .
} }
}
